UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS DENIED, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE IDENTITY OF DOE DEFENDANTS WERE NOT KNOW TO HIM BEFORE THE ACTION WAS FILED, OR THAT THEY DID NOT BECOME KNOWN TO HIM LONG BEFORE THE MOTION WAS FILED, E.G. EMPLOYMENT RELATIONSHIP, UD ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Mtn To Disqualify Atty Whitworth
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Chris Beatty for Plaintiff Ryan Bentham the moving party/ Attorney Steven Whitworth for Defendant Avignon O'Farrell, LLC the opposing party.

Argued: PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM's Motion To Disqualify Attorney Whitworth is DENIED. No confidential information has been shared with Whitworth outside the presence of Ms. Tse. No information material to the current representation was provided to Mr. Whitworth. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Chris Beatty for Plaintiff Ryan Bentham the moving party/ Attorney Steven Whitworth for Defendant Avignon O'Farrell, LLC the opposing party.

Argued: PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint is DENIED, Plaintiff failed to establish that the identity of DOE defendants were not know to him before the action was filed, or that they did not become known to him long before the motion was filed, e.g. employment relationship, UD action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint is Continued to October 21, 2013. Opposition party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than October 18, 2013 by 9:00 a.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Mtn To Disqualify Atty Whitworth
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM Motion To Disqualify Attorney Whitworth is Continued to October 21, 2013. Opposition party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than October 18, 2013 by 9:00 a.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RYAN BENTHAM's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO First Amended Complaint - This motion is off calendar as to Department 302. All future motions should be noticed for Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. (See Local Rule 8.10.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production Of Doucments, Set One, And For Sanctions Against Defts And Their Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on WED-AUG-21-2013:
Hanna B. Oxley, Esq. [510.473.6290] appearing for RYAN BENTHAM, plaintiff / moving party;
No appearance by or on behalf of the defendant.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Plaintiff RYAN BENTHAM'S Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Production of Doucments, Set One, and for Sanctions Against Defendants and Their Counsel of Record. Motion to compel further responses to Interrogatories is granted as it is not opposed. Sanctions in the sum of $1040 are awarded to moving party. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
